flash-attn-3==3.0.0b1
flash-mla==1.0.0+47c35a7
flashinfer-cubin @ https://rtp-opensource.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/rtp_llm/simple/flashinfer-cubin/flashinfer_cubin-0.6.6-py3-none-any.whl

mysql-connector-python
nvidia-cutlass-dsl==4.4.1
# rtp-kernel is built per-arch, so this aarch64 wheel carries a different build
# timestamp than the x86_64 one in requirements_torch_gpu_cuda12_9.txt. Keep both
# pins on the SAME source commit (currently 125c29e5) and bump + regenerate both
# lockfiles together, otherwise a one-sided regen would silently ship mismatched
# rtp-kernel builds across architectures.
rtp-kernel==0.1.0+125c29e5.20260422155252
torch==2.9.0+cu129
torchvision==0.24.0
